LanguageData.Doberkin_TableMachining.label: hybrid machining table
LanguageData.Doberkin_TableMachining.description: A hybrid work station that functions as a tailoring bench and a machining table, allowing anyone to manufacture the basic hardware and gear of the doberman federation.
LanguageData.Doberkin_FabricationBench.label: hybrid fabrication établi
LanguageData.Doberkin_FabricationBench.description: A hybrid workbench that is equipped with sophisticated tools, which allows talented crafters to manufacture advanced hardware and gears of the doberman federation.
